# CMakeLists.txt - TI MSPM0
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.28)

# Propagate variables to try_compile subproject (CMake 3.24+)
set(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE_PLATFORM_VARIABLES TI_SDK_ROOT GCC_ROOT)

# Chip model (set by CMakePresets.json)
if(NOT DEFINED CHIP_MODEL)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "CHIP_MODEL not set. Run configure.bat first.")
endif()

# Toolchain file (generated by configure.bat)
set(CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.cmake/toolchain/toolchain.cmake")
if(NOT EXISTS "${CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE}")
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Toolchain not found: ${CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE}\n"
                        "Run configure.bat to generate it.")
endif()


# Project definition
project(${PROJECT_NAME} C CXX ASM)

# Output paths
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/outputs)
set(HEX_FILE ${CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY}/${PROJECT_NAME}.hex)
set(ELF_FILE ${CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY}/${PROJECT_NAME}.elf)
set(MAP_FILE ${CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY}/${PROJECT_NAME}.map)

# Source files
file(GLOB_RECURSE SRC_FILES
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/User/*.c
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/User/*.cpp
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Core/*.c
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Core/*.cpp
)

add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME} ${SRC_FILES})
set_target_properties(${PROJECT_NAME} PROPERTIES SUFFIX ".elf")

# Include paths
target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    ${TI_SDK_ROOT}/source/third_party/CMSIS/Core/Include
    ${TI_SDK_ROOT}/source
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/User
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Core/Inc
)

# Compile options (SysConfig response file defines)
# -mcpu / -mthumb / -ffunction-sections etc. injected by toolchain
target_compile_options(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    @${OPT_SCRIPT}
)

# Linker options
# -T linker script / -specs etc. injected by toolchain
target_link_options(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    -Wl,-Map=${MAP_FILE}
)

# Read and link libraries from SysConfig-generated device.lds.genlibs
# Missing libs will error; disable genLib* features in .syscfg if needed
include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.cmake/utils/link_syscfg_libs.cmake)
link_syscfg_libs(${PROJECT_NAME} "${TI_SDK_ROOT}" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.ti/generate/device.lds.genlibs")

# ARM GCC embedded runtime
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    gcc
    c
    m
)

# Post-build: generate .hex file
add_custom_command(
    TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME} POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_OBJCOPY} -O ihex ${ELF_FILE} ${HEX_FILE}
    COMMENT "Generating ${HEX_FILE}"
)

# Configuration summary
message(STATUS "========================================")
message(STATUS "Project:        ${PROJECT_NAME}")
message(STATUS "Build Type:     ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}")
message(STATUS "Chip Model:     ${CHIP_MODEL}")
message(STATUS "Chip Family:    ${CHIP_FAMILY}")
message(STATUS "Core:           ${CORE}")
message(STATUS "Architecture:   ${ARCH}")
message(STATUS "TI SDK:         ${TI_SDK_ROOT}")
message(STATUS "Output Dir:     ${CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY}")
message(STATUS "========================================")
